description: Product card shown in grids, search results, and recommendations

standard.label: Standard Card
standard.description: Vertical card with image, title, price, and quick-add button. DaisyUI card with shadow hover.

minimal.label: Minimal Card
minimal.description: Clean card without shadows or borders. Image + text only, modern aesthetic.

horizontal.label: Horizontal Card
horizontal.description: Side-by-side image and content. Good for list view or search results.

featured.label: Featured Card
featured.description: Larger, prominent card for hero/spotlight positions. Bigger image, rating stars, sale badge with savings percentage, and Quick Add button.
